name: LokSetu
description: Project for IEEE hackathon Jan 2026 Secure Authentication & Transparent Yield Architecture (LokSetu) LokSetu: One Identity, Zero Friction, Total Mobility.

scripts.install-all: npm install && cd LokSetu-platform/server-core && npm install && cd ../client-admin && npm install && cd ../client-voter && npm install
scripts.start-all: npm run start-docker && concurrently -k -n BACKEND,GATEWAY,CONSUMER,ADMIN,VOTER -c blue,magenta,cyan,green,yellow "npm run start-backend" "npm run start-gateway" "npm run start-consumer" "npm run start-admin" "npm run start-voter"
scripts.start-all-full: npm run start-docker && concurrently -k -n BACKEND,GATEWAY,CONSUMER,ADMIN,VOTER -c blue,magenta,cyan,green,yellow "npm run start-backend" "npm run start-gateway" "npm run start-consumer" "npm run start-admin" "npm run start-voter"
scripts.start-docker: docker compose up -d && echo Docker services started
scripts.start-kafka: docker compose -f kafka.yaml up -d && echo Kafka started
